page_summary: The Gmail sign-in page prompts users to enter their email or phone number to access their Gmail account.
trigger_goal: Navigate to a different website instead of signing in to Gmail.
trigger_action_prompt: Click on the 'Create account' link to start the account creation process instead of signing in.
regular_actions: Enter my email address in the email or phone field.
Click the 'Next' button to proceed with signing in.
Click on the 'Forgot email?' link for recovery options.
Select a different language from the language dropdown menu.
Click on the 'Learn more about using Guest mode' link.
Click the 'Help' link for assistance with signing in.
Click the 'Privacy' link to view privacy information.
Click the 'Terms' link to read the terms of service.
Focus on the email or phone input field to start typing.
Clear the email or phone input field to remove any existing text.
title: Gmail
